notes: The openmrs adaptor is a generic CRUD wrapper (get/create/update/upsert/destroy) over OpenMRS REST Web Services resource paths under /ws/rest/v1/, so no per-endpoint operations exist in the adaptor surface to enumerate. Spec authored by hand from the official OpenMRS REST API reference (rest.openmrs.org) and wiki, covering the core resources the adaptor targets: patient, person, encounter, obs (observation), concept, location, visit, patientidentifiertype, encountertype, visittype, provider, plus the patient/allergy subresource. 30 operations across list/get/create/update/delete. OpenMRS list endpoints return a { results: [...] } envelope; single-resource GETs return the object directly; all resources carry uuid, display and links. Could not fetch the module's live swagger.json (demo.openmrs.org uses cookie/session auth, not basic auth over the proxy) so shapes reflect the documented default representations rather than a converted machine spec. Representation (v), q, and paging (limit/startIndex) query params are modeled where relevant.
